# ToddlerTravelGear

> Honest, safety-first gear recommendations for parents traveling with babies and toddlers.

ToddlerTravelGear.com is an independent review site covering travel gear for families with children ages 0-4. We publish in-depth product reviews, category roundups, and travel guides based on real-world parent testing.

## Content Categories

- **Product Reviews** (133 reviews): Individual gear reviews with safety notes, age-by-age breakdowns, and comparison sections. Categories include travel strollers, car seats, portable cribs, carriers, feeding gear, sleep accessories, toys, safety/baby-proofing, bath/hygiene, packing organizers, stroller accessories, and more.
- **Best Picks Roundups** (14 guides): Curated category roundups comparing top products side-by-side with testing methodology and pick rationale.
- **Travel Guides** (20 guides): Practical guides covering flying with toddlers, road trips, international travel, packing lists, hotel baby-proofing, jet lag management, and more.

## Key Topics

- FAA-approved car seats for flying
- Travel strollers that fit in airplane overhead bins
- Portable cribs and travel sleep solutions
- Gate-checking strollers and car seats
- Toddler packing checklists by age
- Baby-proofing hotel rooms and vacation rentals
- Road trip gear and entertainment
- Travel feeding and bottle solutions

## Site Structure

- `/best/[category]` — Roundup guides (e.g., /best/travel-strollers-for-flying)
- `/reviews/[product]` — Individual product reviews (e.g., /reviews/stokke-yoyo3)
- `/guides/[topic]` — Travel guides (e.g., /guides/flying-with-toddler-complete-guide)
- `/sitemap.xml` — Full sitemap with all URLs

## Contact

- Website: https://toddlertravelgear.com
- Email: contact@toddlertravelgear.com
